pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.CfnAbout:
The parameters required to set up a target for your pipe.

For more information about pipe target parameters, including how to use dynamic path parameters, see [Target parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/eventbridge/latest/userguide/eb-pipes-event-target.html) in the *Amazon EventBridge User Guide*.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.BatchJob.Description: The parameters for using an AWS Batch job as a target.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.CloudWat.Description: The parameters for using an CloudWatch Logs log stream as a target.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.EcsTaskP.Description: The parameters for using an Amazon ECS task as a target.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.EventBri.Description: The parameters for using an EventBridge event bus as a target.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.HttpPara.Description: These are custom parameter to be used when the target is an API Gateway REST APIs or EventBridge ApiDestinations.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.InputTem.Description: Valid JSON text passed to the target. In this case, nothing from the event itself is passed to the target. For more information, see [The JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) Data Interchange Format](http://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7159.txt).  To remove an input template, specify an empty string.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.KinesisS.Description: The parameters for using a Kinesis stream as a target.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.LambdaFu.Description: The parameters for using a Lambda function as a target.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.Redshift.Description: These are custom parameters to be used when the target is a Amazon Redshift cluster to invoke the Amazon Redshift Data API BatchExecuteStatement.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.SageMake.Description: The parameters for using a SageMaker pipeline as a target.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.SqsQueue.Description: The parameters for using a Amazon SQS stream as a target.

pipes.pipe.pipetargetparameters.StepFunc.Description: The parameters for using a Step Functions state machine as a target.
